title: Car Customisation Website

requirements.text: Create a backend actor that stores car customisation configurations, including fields for: car model, body color, wheel style, interior color, and any additional accessories. Expose functions to save, retrieve, and list configurations by user.
acceptanceCriteria: Actor exposes a saveConfig function that stores a car configuration with all listed fields.
Actor exposes a getMyConfig function that returns the saved configuration for the calling principal.
Actor exposes a listConfigs function that returns all saved configurations.
Data persists across canister upgrades using stable storage.

requirements.text: Build a car customisation UI with a live preview panel and a controls sidebar. The preview panel should display the customised car rendered in 3D using Three.js/React Three Fiber. The controls sidebar should allow the user to select: car model (at least 3 options), body color (color picker), wheel style (at least 3 options), and interior color (color picker).
acceptanceCriteria: A 3D car model is rendered in the preview panel and updates in real-time as options are changed.
User can select from at least 3 car model variants.
User can pick a body color via a color picker and see it applied to the 3D model.
User can select from at least 3 wheel styles.
User can pick an interior color via a color picker.
All changes are reflected immediately in the 3D preview without a page reload.

requirements.text: Add a 'Save Configuration' button that persists the current customisation state to the backend. Add a 'Load My Configuration' button that retrieves and applies the user's last saved configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Save Configuration' calls the backend saveConfig function and shows a success notification.
Clicking 'Load My Configuration' fetches and applies the saved configuration to the UI and 3D preview.
Error states are handled gracefully with user-facing messages.

requirements.text: Apply a sleek, dark automotive showroom visual theme throughout the site. Use a dark charcoal and matte black background palette with metallic silver and amber accent colors. Use bold, modern sans-serif typography. The layout should feel like a premium car configurator — minimal chrome, high contrast UI, spotlight-style lighting on the 3D model preview. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: The overall color scheme uses dark charcoal/matte black backgrounds with metallic silver and amber accents.
Typography uses a bold, modern sans-serif font.
The 3D preview area has a spotlight or stage-light aesthetic.
The theme is applied consistently across the customisation page, header, and any navigation elements.

requirements.text: Render the generated hero/branding image (car-showroom-hero.dim_1920x600.png) as a static asset in the header or landing section of the website.
acceptanceCriteria: The hero image is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/car-showroom-hero.dim_1920x600.png.
The image displays correctly in the header or top section of the page.

constraints: All backend logic must reside in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo.
Do not edit any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Generated images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated, not through the backend.
nonGoals: Actual vehicle ordering or dealer integration.
Mobile app or React Native version.

required: Dark automotive showroom hero banner with dramatic spotlight lighting on a sleek modern sports car silhouette, metallic silver and amber accent tones, wide cinematic crop (car-showroom-hero.dim_1920x600.png)
